title: Pixel users report phones freezing on startup screen after latest Google update, company responds
summary: After the March 2026 Pixel update, many users report their devices are stuck in bootloop, making them unusable. Google has also responded to the issue saying that it is actively looking for a solution, and recommends contacting Pixel support for help.

title: Mac users, update your ChatGPT app immediately: OpenAI issues urgent security warning
summary: OpenAI reported a security issue related to third-party library Axios. The company said it found no evidence of compromised user data or altered systems.&nbsp;

title: Vijay Sales Apple Days: Check out top offers on iPhone 17 Pro Max, iPhone 17, iPhone 16 and more
summary: Vijay Sales has launched its Apple Days sale from April 11 to 16. The e-commerce platform is offering discounts on iPhones and other Apple products.&nbsp;

title: How to edit your comments on Instagram? Check step-by-step guide
summary: Instagram now allow users to edit comments within 15 minutes of posting. Users can make unlimited edits during this time, but only the text portion can be changed, and an edited label will be visible to others.

title: Why was Claude Mythos really delayed? OpenAI points to Anthropic's massive compute constraints, says report
summary: OpenAI has claimed that it has a significant advantage over Anthropic due to its early expansion of computing resources. The company also said in a leaked memo that Claude Mythos was delayed due to computing issues.

title: 'The biggest consumer fraud': Telegram CEO claims WhatsApp is secretly reading your private messages
summary: Telegram's CEO Pavel Durov has criticized WhatsApp's encryption claims, labeling them as ‘biggest consumer fraud in history’. Durov asserted that WhatsApp reads users' messages and shares them, a sentiment echoed by Elon Musk.&nbsp;

title: OpenAI takes on Anthropic, overhauls ChatGPT Pro subscription with new AI plan: here's what you need to know
summary: OpenAI has launched a $100/month ChatGPT subscription, offering increased Codex usage to compete with Anthropic's Claude Code. The new Pro tier provides access to exclusive features and the company is also offering a temporary promotion for existing users.

title: Elon Musk says WhatsApp's end-to-end encryption can't be trusted, Mark Zuckerberg's company calls it ‘absurd’
summary: Elon Musk criticized WhatsApp, saying 'can't trust' it, in light of a class-action lawsuit alleging Meta intercepted private messages despite WhatsApp's end-to-end encryption promises. He also encouraged users to switch to X Chat, which he promotes as an encrypted chat experience.

title: Indias 5G consumers will reach over a billion by 2030: Jyotiraditya M Scindia
summary: Union Minister of Communications, Jyotiraditya M Scindia, stated that India will have more than a billion users of 5G by the year 2030. Speaking at AIMA's 11th National Leadership Conclave, the Minister highlighted that India became the second-largest mobile phone producer globally.

title: OpenAI identifies security issue involving third-party tool, says user data was not accessed
summary: OpenAI said on Friday it had identified a ​security issue involving a ​third-party developer tool called Axios and is ​taking steps to protect the process that certifies its macOS applications are legitimate OpenAI apps.

title: JD Vance, Bessent questions tech giants on AI security before Anthropic's Mythos release
summary: Anthropic's Dario ​Amodei, Alphabet's Sundar Pichai, OpenAI's Sam Altman, Microsoft's Satya Nadella and the heads of ​Palo Alto Networks and CrowdStrike were ⁠on ‌the call, according to ​the ​report.

title: Suspect arrested after Molotov cocktail attack at OpenAI CEO Sam Altman's home
summary: San ​Francisco police arrested a person ​for allegedly throwing a Molotov cocktail at OpenAI ​CEO Sam Altman's home and for making threats outside the artificial intelligence startup's headquarters, the company said on Friday.

title: IBM to pay $17 million to settle US government probe over DEI
summary: ​IBM has agreed to pay $17 ​million to settle a US government ​probe over the firm's diversity, equity and inclusion practices, which President Donald Trump's administration has cracked down on during his second term ‌in office.

title: Tesla's supervised self-driving software gets Dutch okay, first in Europe
summary: Dutch regulators approved the ​use of Tesla's self-driving software with required human supervision on highways and city streets in a European first for the electric car maker, which hopes to see similar action from the rest of the European Union.

title: Rapid fashion startups are dressed to kill…but can the model keep up?

summary: Global professional services giant Accenture has strategically invested in AI software development platform Replit. title: South Africa unveils draft AI policy, proposes new institutions and incentives
summary: The AI policy, published by the Department of Communications and Digital Technologies, aims to position ‌South Africa ⁠as ⁠a continental leader in AI innovation while addressing ethical, social ​and economic challenges.

title: Commvault explores sale after takeover interest
summary: Commvault, which has a market capitalisation of about $3.5 billion, is working with Goldman Sachs on its options after fielding inquiries ‌from both ⁠private equity ⁠firms and strategic buyers.
